title: fagara mantchurica f. microphylla
intro: Fagara mantchurica f. microphylla, also known as the Korean prickly ash, is a plant species that belongs to the family Rutaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and analgesic properties. The health benefits of Fagara mantchurica f. microphylla include relieving pain and inflammation, as well as treating various respiratory and digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or dried powder to make teas, tonics, and other remedies.
